name: Crunchy Cereal Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe dish, combine the margarine and brown sugar.
2. Microwave on high about 1 minute to melt the margarine.
3. Beat in the egg when the sugar mixture has cooled, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the shredded wheat, walnuts, and raisins. Stir until well mixed.
5. Pat into the bottom of a 5 inch square microwave-safe dish.
6. Microwave on High about 4-6 minutes. Let stand for at least 10 minutes before cutting into bars.
To prepare in a conventional oven:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together margarine and brown sugar.
3. Beat in egg and add the rest of ingredients.
4. Pat mixture into bottom of an 8 inch square pan.
5. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until the top is browned.
6. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting into 18 bars.
